title: alnus alnobetula var. brembana
intro: Alnus alnobetula var. brembana, also known as the Brembana green alder, is a variety of the alder tree that is native to the Italian Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been shown to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alnus alnobetula var. brembana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
